data.name: Hot Homework Help
data.detailed_description:
ABOUT
Student Kelly is attending university but has no interest in her education. She lives with her wealthy mother and has everything except knowledge at university. That's why she's trying to befriend you, the straight-A student. Help Kelly prepare for her exams, but don't forget that Kelly will want to repay you for your help using other methods.

After you enter Kelly's house, a new problem will arise - her mother, who is also interested in you. Try to prepare Kelly for her chemistry exams, but at the same time, resist the temptations of this household.

FEATURES
• Around 2 hours of Gameplay
• Hot scenes
• Non-linearity of the plot

After you enter Kelly's house, a new problem will arise - her mother, who is also interested in you. Try to prepare Kelly for her chemistry exams, but at the same time, resist the temptations of this household.

FEATURES

data.short_description: Kelly is an uninterested university student living with a wealthy mother, lacking knowledge. She's trying to befriend you, the top student. Assist her with exams, but remember she may want to repay you differently.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 日文*, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2, or WebGL
  • 儲存空間: 250 MB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7
  • Processor: 1 Ghz
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9
  • Storage: 200 MB available space

Recommended:

  • OS: Windows 10

  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2, or WebGL
  • Storage: 250 MB available space
